prompt: Create a premium luxury patisserie product photograph of a limited-edition chocolate box inspired by an original anime-style girl character named Nozomu. The box is open on an elegant dark satin tabletop with crystal glassware, soft flowers, scattered sparkles, and a pale satin ribbon, photographed like a real high-end department-store confectionery gift set. The inside lid features a large illustrated package design: a dreamy moonlit night sky with teal-to-navy gradient, crescent moon, hanging gold stars, city skyline silhouettes, ornate gold corner filigree, pale pink and blue flowers, and an anime girl with long dark bluish-black hair with pink highlights, floral hair accessories, and an off-shoulder white ruffled dress; leave the face unobstructed in the generated image unless a privacy-safe blank face placeholder is desired. Add elegant gold Japanese-style branding text on the lid: のぞむ, small romanized text NOZOMU, script subtitle Moonlit Dream, and small uppercase text "CHOCOLATE COLLECTION". In the lower tray, show exactly 10 luxury chocolates in a 2-by-5 grid with gold dividers and black paper cups: 1 glossy sky-blue dome with gold leaf, 2 cream rose-shaped chocolate, 3 faceted pale blue crystal chocolate, 4 dark round chocolate with gold crescent moon and starry night surface, 5 white daisy flower chocolate with gold center, 6 pale blue-white speckled dome, 7 pink flower chocolate with gold center, 8 glossy purple-blue heart chocolate with tiny star speckles, 9 faceted pale blush crystal chocolate with gold flecks, and 10 sky-blue marbled dome with gold constellation lines. Include a matching small display card in front of the box with the same branding text and moon motif. Use soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections, delicate gold foil details, pastel celestial palette, ultra-detailed premium packaging, and a romantic fantasy luxury chocolate aesthetic. Avoid extra chocolates, avoid modern logos, avoid cluttered typography, and keep the box and all 10 chocolates sharply visible.
